home.heroSubtitle: A TSX-listed precious metals producer with a portfolio of producing assets in South America.
home.problemStatLabel: of active mining projects face cost overruns or schedule delays
home.problemBody: Investors in junior mining companies wait years for production. Most exploration stories never translate to real cashflow.
home.solutionBody: Four operating assets generating gold and silver revenue across Bolivia. No exploration promises — just production, cash flow, and growth.
home.projectsSectionSubtitle: A producing portfolio of gold and silver assets.
home.esgSectionSubtitle: Partnering with local Bolivian communities and environmental organizations to ensure our operations create lasting positive impact.
home.contactBandSubtitle: For shareholder inquiries, analyst coverage requests, or investor presentations.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: A portfolio of gold and silver assets across Bolivia.
projects.mapTeaserSubtitle: Four assets spanning three departments — from producing mines to advanced-stage development.

about.title: About Mycelium Minerals
about.subtitle: Leadership, values, and our commitment to responsible mining.
about.ceoQuote: We built Mycelium on a simple idea: mines that produce, not promises. Every decision starts with operational discipline and community respect.
about.executiveTeamSubtitle: Experienced operators with deep expertise in Latin American mining.
about.boardSubtitle: Independent oversight from leaders across finance, mining, and sustainability.
about.value1Desc: Delivering consistent production and cost discipline across all four operating sites.
about.value2Desc: Partnering with Bolivian communities to create lasting social and economic value.
about.value3Desc: Maintaining the highest standards of reporting and accountability as a TSX issuer.

sustainability.title: Sustainability & ESG
sustainability.subtitle: Our commitment to people, environment, and responsible operations.
sustainability.environmentalDesc: Partnering with local Bolivian organizations to restore native ecosystems. Since 2019, we have planted 50,000+ native trees across the Bolivian highlands.
sustainability.socialDesc: 85% of our 1,200-person workforce is locally hired. We invest in education, healthcare, and infrastructure for 12 surrounding communities.
sustainability.governanceDesc: We report in accordance with GRI Standards and TSX corporate governance guidelines, with independent board oversight of all ESG commitments.
sustainability.reportDesc: Our annual ESG report details progress against all commitments.

news.title: News & Media
news.subtitle: Press releases, media coverage, and corporate updates.

careers.culture1Desc: Every role contributes to responsible production and community development in Bolivia.
careers.culture2Desc: Work with colleagues across Bolivia, Canada, and internationally.
careers.culture3Desc: We promote from within and invest in professional development.
